user.title: Amazon Orders
user.description: Configure IMAP access for Amazon order emails

init.title: Amazon Order Options
init.description: Configure how Home Assistant tracks and processes Amazon order emails.  delivered_retention_days  - How many days should HA track delivered orders?     update_interval - how often should HA check for delivery updates?

purge_order.name: Purge order
purge_order.description: Remove a specific order from tracking. The order will no longer appear in the Amazon Order Status sensors.

order_id.name: Order ID
order_id.description: The Amazon order number to remove (e.g. 123-4567890-1234567). You can copy this from the sensor's order list.
